name: starrystonetech
description: Starrystone Tech (乾芯) is a leading Chinese fabless semiconductor company specializing in power management ICs, AC-DC controllers, LED drivers, and power discrete devices for consumer electronics, industrial, and new energy applications.
longDescription: Shenzhen Starrystone Technology Co., Ltd. (乾芯), founded in 2015 and headquartered in Shenzhen, China, is a premier fabless semiconductor company focused on power semiconductor solutions. The company has established a strong reputation in the power management market, providing high-performance and cost-effective solutions for AC-DC power supplies, LED lighting, industrial power, and new energy applications. With a commitment to innovation and quality, Starrystone Tech has developed comprehensive product portfolios including PWM controllers, synchronous rectifiers, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and gate drivers. Their products are widely adopted by leading power supply manufacturers and have been deployed in millions of devices worldwide. The company's R&D team consists of experienced power electronics engineers with deep expertise in power conversion technologies.

coreProducts.name: AC-DC Controllers
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency PWM controllers and synchronous rectifiers for power adapters and chargers

coreProducts.name: DC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: Buck, boost, and buck-boost converters for various voltage conversion applications

coreProducts.name: LED Drivers
coreProducts.description: Comprehensive LED driver solutions for general lighting and display applications

coreProducts.name: Gate Drivers
coreProducts.description: High and low-side gate drivers for MOSFET and IGBT power switches

industries.name: Consumer Power
industries.description: Power adapters, chargers, and consumer electronics power supplies

industries.name: LED Lighting
industries.description: General lighting, commercial lighting, and display backlighting

industries.name: Industrial Power
industries.description: Industrial power supplies, motor drives, and automation equipment

industries.name: New Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, energy storage, and electric vehicle charging

seoTitle: Starrystone Tech Distributor - Power Semiconductor & LED Driver Solutions
seoDescription: LiTong is an authorized distributor of Starrystone Tech (乾芯). We supply AC-DC controllers, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and gate drivers for power management applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Starrystone Tech products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Starrystone Tech (乾芯). We have established a strategic partnership with Starrystone Tech to provide customers with genuine products, technical support, and competitive pricing. As an authorized distributor, we ensure product authenticity, provide factory warranty support, and offer comprehensive technical services including reference designs, application notes, and FAE support. Our inventory includes the full range of Starrystone Tech products including AC-DC controllers, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and gate drivers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for Starrystone Tech product inquiries, samples, and technical documentation. We can provide competitive pricing for both small and large volume orders.

faqs.question: What are Starrystone Tech's core competitive advantages?
faqs.answer: Starrystone Tech has established several key competitive advantages in the power semiconductor market. First, they offer high-performance products at competitive prices, providing excellent value for cost-sensitive applications. Second, their products feature high integration levels, reducing external component count and simplifying design. Third, they provide comprehensive solutions from controllers to complete reference designs. Fourth, their products are known for reliability and robust protection features. Fifth, they offer strong local technical support with quick response times. These advantages make Starrystone Tech a preferred choice for power management solutions in consumer, industrial, and lighting applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For projects requiring cost-effective power solutions, Starrystone Tech offers excellent value. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements.

faqs.question: How do Starrystone Tech products compare to international brands?
faqs.answer: Starrystone Tech products offer competitive performance compared to international brands while providing better cost-effectiveness and local support. Their AC-DC controllers achieve efficiency and protection features comparable to leading international suppliers. The key advantages include faster local technical support, shorter lead times, more flexible MOQ policies, and competitive pricing. For the China market and export manufacturing, Starrystone Tech provides significant advantages in supply chain efficiency and cost optimization. Many customers have successfully replaced international brands with Starrystone Tech solutions while maintaining or improving performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Starrystone Tech for cost-sensitive projects requiring reliable power solutions. We can provide comparison analysis with international brands for your specific application.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Starrystone Tech products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Starrystone Tech products through LiTong provides multiple advantages. As an authorized distributor, we guarantee genuine products with full factory warranty. We maintain strategic inventory for fast delivery on popular models. Our technical team includes experienced FAEs who can provide application support, schematic review, and debugging assistance. We offer flexible payment terms and competitive pricing for various volume levels. Additionally, we provide value-added services including reference designs, application notes, and customized solutions. Our close relationship with Starrystone Tech ensures priority access to new products and technical resources.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for a quotation and to discuss how we can support your project with Starrystone Tech solutions. We offer samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What applications are Starrystone Tech products suitable for?
faqs.answer: Starrystone Tech products are designed for a wide range of power management applications. Their AC-DC controllers are ideal for power adapters, chargers, and switching power supplies. DC-DC converters suit applications requiring voltage step-down, step-up, or buck-boost conversion. LED drivers provide solutions for general lighting, commercial lighting, and display backlighting. Gate drivers enable efficient control of power MOSFETs and IGBTs in motor drives and power conversion applications. The products are widely used in consumer electronics, industrial equipment, lighting systems, and new energy applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your power requirements and application needs, then contact us to select the optimal Starrystone Tech solution for your application.

faqs.question: Does Starrystone Tech provide reference designs and technical documentation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Starrystone Tech provides comprehensive technical support including detailed datasheets, application notes, reference designs, and evaluation boards. Their reference designs cover typical applications such as power adapters, LED drivers, and DC-DC converters, providing complete schematics, PCB layouts, and BOM lists. Application notes offer detailed guidance on component selection, thermal management, and optimization techniques. Through LiTong, customers can access these resources and receive additional technical support from our FAE team for design review and troubleshooting.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request reference designs and technical documentation from our team when evaluating Starrystone Tech products for your project.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Starrystone Tech products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Starrystone Tech products vary depending on the specific part and order quantity. Standard products typically have lead times of 4-8 weeks for production orders. LiTong maintains inventory of popular models for immediate delivery on sample and small volume orders. For high-volume production orders, we recommend placing orders in advance to ensure supply continuity. Starrystone Tech's domestic manufacturing advantage often results in shorter lead times compared to international suppliers. Contact our sales team for current lead time information and to discuss your forecast and scheduling requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us with your forecast requirements to ensure supply continuity. We can discuss inventory programs for high-volume production.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Starrystone Tech product for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Starrystone Tech product involves several steps. First, identify your application requirements including input voltage range, output voltage/current, and power level. Second, determine the topology needed (flyback, forward, buck, boost, etc.). Third, consider efficiency requirements and any specific features needed (synchronous rectification, PFC, dimming, etc.). Fourth, evaluate package options and thermal requirements. Fifth, check for any specific certifications needed. Starrystone Tech provides selection guides and our FAE team can provide personalized recommendations based on your specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our selection guides or contact our FAE team for personalized product recommendations based on your application requirements.
